display.purpose: Main brand logo and primary headers.

headline.purpose: Major dashboard and panel segment headers.

title.purpose: Component headings and list item names.

body.purpose: Interface instruction copy and document content.

label.purpose: Button labels, input eyebrows, and metadata counters.

shadows.name: glow-interactive
shadows.purpose: Soft deep interactive shadow appearing on element hover.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default duration for interactive state switches.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action submit button, featuring a linear gradient.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #a855f7 100%); color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.95; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px 0 rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b5cf6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Used for passive or secondary dashboard actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: #f8fafc; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input field for forms and queries.
components.css: .ds-input-field { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 8px; color: #f8fafc; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-field:focus { outline: none; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-color: #8b5cf6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); } .ds-input-field::placeholder { color: #64748b; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Visual panel wrapper with backdrop blur overlay styling.
components.html:
Painel de Documentos

Este é o corpo informativo do painel. A densidade visual é preservada.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(18, 19, 26, 0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-glass-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f8fafc; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: "The Semantic Terminal" is a developer-focused, information-dense, and highly structured dashboard design. Designed specifically for inspecting vector similarity and managing embedding indices, it rejects decorative fluff in favor of raw database reality, technical utility, and visual structure. The experience should feel like walking into a well-lit server room: silent, hyper-organized, and fast.
keyCharacteristics: Information-Dense Grid Layouts: Maximized screen utility with clean panel boundaries.
Precise Accent Anchoring: Accents are reserved exclusively for interactive elements and state feedback.
Micro-elevation Responses: Interfaces are flat and clean at rest, lifting only when hovered or active.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Accents (indigo, cyan, violet) must occupy less than 10% of the screen real estate. Color is a high-contrast indicator of interactivity or similarity, not a background wash.

rules.name: The High-Contrast Input Rule
rules.body: Input values and active selections must meet a minimum 4.5:1 contrast against their dark background. Text should never be hard to read for the sake of "minimalism."

rules.name: The No-Caps Prose Rule
rules.body: All-caps formatting is strictly limited to short labels, eyebrows, and button prompts (under 4 words). Sentence-length body text must never be uppercase.

rules.name: The Flat-Rest Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements (cards, buttons) rest flat against the surface. Shadow offsets and border highlight transitions trigger exclusively as feedback to user hover or focus states.

rules.name: The Flat Border Rule
rules.body: All borders separating panels must be thin (1px) and dark (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)), serving as clean visual boundaries rather than glowing lines.

dos: Do maintain a strict 4.5:1 text contrast on all dashboard elements.
Do preserve the Outift font stack across all components and platforms.
Do use text-wrap: balance on H1 and H2 headers to prevent awkward line breaks.
Do use transition speeds of exactly 0.3s with cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) for smooth micro-interactions.
donts: Don't use colored side-stripe borders (e.g. border-left: 4px) to denote page sections or alert blocks.
Don't use gradient text on headers (e.g., background-clip: text combined with gradient backgrounds). Headings must remain solid white.
Don't animate or transform the size or position of elements during parent container hovers.
Don't use uppercase eyebrows above every page section title. Use them only for sequence-driven labels.
Don't add random backdrop blur glassmorphism as a default background decoration. Use solid or standard semi-transparent surfaces unless establishing overlay depth.
